title: Sword Blocking
description: This datapack brings the sword blocking feature back to the game.
body:
# 🛡️ Sword Blocking

### This datapack brings the sword blocking feature back to the game.
![Sword Blocking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eQumxk6y/images/a89d39516b8417453f2e2c82f18e200646505513.gif)

## 🧱 Compatibility
- This datapack only works on versions 25w04a(1.21.5) and above

## ✨ Features
- Works with all swords

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the datapack `.zip` file.
2. Place it in your world's `datapacks` folder.
3. Use `/reload` after joining the world.
4. You're all set! Move around and see your coordinates at the bottom of your screen.

## 🌐 ITITAN Hosting
[![ITITAN Hosting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/3geETR/images/refs/heads/main/Other/ititan.png)](https://ititanhosting.com/game/minecraft)

## 💬 Feedback and Request
